issues.description: Default the local workflow to a browser-accessible dashboard port and add a CLI entry that prints the panel URL for operators.
issues.title: Expose the local dashboard through a browser-friendly entrypoint

issues.description: Neutralize prompt fallback copy in config, prompt builder, and agent runner so local-tracker runs never regress to Linear-specific instructions.
issues.title: Remove remaining Linear wording from fallback prompts and continuation text

issues.description: Update status dashboard, orchestrator logs, and workspace cleanup comments so the local tracker remains the only operator mental model.
issues.title: Refactor operator-facing dashboard and cleanup copy away from Linear

issues.description: Stop advertising Linear-only dynamic tools during local runs and replace them with local issue tracker commands or no-op-safe alternatives.
issues.title: Replace the linear_graphql dynamic tool with a local tracker-safe tool surface

issues.description: Move core issue docs and types toward tracker-neutral names so the local workflow is the only mainline abstraction.
issues.title: Rename the core issue model away from Linear.Issue

issues.description: Persist claim/lease ownership in the local tracker so multiple Symphony runtimes can safely work from the same issue store without duplicate dispatch. Include orchestrator claim/release/heartbeat behavior and operator-visible lease details.
issues.title: Add tracker-backed issue leasing for distributed local runs
